creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
% pkg info --list linux-c7-strace | grep strace.
linux-c7-strace-4.24_3:
        /compat/linux/usr/bin/strace-log-merge
        /compat/linux/usr/share/man/man1/strace-log-merge.1.gz
        /compat/linux/usr/share/man/man1/strace.1.gz
% man 1 strace
No manual entry for strace
% 


Also, <https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=strace&sektion=1&manpath=Ports> finds nothing.
